question: Which year from 2008-2010 has the highest total value for MTA's 'Total Ridership' indicator? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: An MTA analyst wants to compare early-period ridership totals across years to understand demand trends.

1.fact: Filtering to Indicator Name = "Total Ridership" and summing Monthly Actual by Period Year for 2008-2010, 2008 has the highest total at 170913704.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2008-2010 has the highest total value for MTA's 'Total Ridership' indicator? (Filter Indicator Name == "Total Ridership"; sum Monthly Actual by Period Year; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum Monthly Actual for "Total Ridership" by year (2008-2010) and select the maximum; the peak year is 2008.
